name: @block-agent/memory-letta
description: memory_letta BlockApp: semantic recall via external Letta server. Letta SDK dependency is isolated here; @block-agent/core never imports it (DR-M4).
$exports_note: Mirrors @block-agent/core's wildcard subpath map: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build step). The cli imports '@block-agent/memory-letta/memory_letta_app.js' which NodeNext resolves to ./src/memory_letta_app.ts via the workspace symlink. tsx runs the same source directly.
